label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. Carmen Rivera wrote this letter to Disney after their visit to Magic Kingdom. The main event was about their daughter Gloria and the ice-cream incident on Space Mountain. The staff member Murphy helped by holding the ice-cream and then replacing it with a new one. Now, the question is asking what the purpose of the letter was. The options are (A) order ice-creams, (B) promise to visit again, (C) express her thanks, or (D) give some suggestions. First, looking at the structure of the letter. It starts with a positive experience, then describes a specific event that made them feel magical. The staff member Murphy went above and beyond by getting a new ice-cream for Gloria. The letter ends with "Thanks so much for going above and beyond!" and "We know that _ tried hard to make our visit special. Thanks so much..."
